headline: Why Lam Research (LRCX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of semiconductor equipment maker Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) jumped 2.8% in the morning session after UBS raised its price target on the stock to $375 from $310, adding to an ongoing rally.

headline: Lam Research (LRCX): A Strategic Investment in the Transformative Industry
summary: Sands Capital Management, LLC released its Q1 2026 investor letter for its “Select Growth Strategy”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Lam Research, Raises Price Target to $375
summary: UBS  analyst Timothy Arcuri   maintains Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) with a Buy and raises the price target from $310 to $375.

headline: Ultra Clean and Thor Industries have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: UCTT is highlighted as Zacks' Bull of the Day on rising AI-driven chip demand and surging earnings estimates, while a cautious industry backdrop weighs on peers.

headline: Semtech, Lam Research, and Photronics Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the broader semiconductor sector recovered from a sharp selloff during the previous trading session.
